#summary OCTGN Technical Reference start page.
<h1>OCTGN Technical Reference</h1>

Welcome to the online technical reference for everything related to OCTGN.

OCTGN's lead developers, d0c, drilus, ralig and gravecorp, try to ensure that the content here is mostly accurate and correct.

<h2>Creating game modules</h2>

[open_packaging_conventions Open Packaging Conventions]
[scripting_in_python Scripting in Python]
[game_definition_o8g Game definition (o8g)]
[set_definition_o8s Set definition (o8s])
[deck_file_format_o8d Deck file format (o8d)]
[patch_file_format_o8p Patch file format (o8p)]

<h2>Software using OCTGN data</h2>

If you code in .NET, you can access OCTGN data using its own assembly.<br/>
[octgn_data_access OCTGN Data access]

<h2>Bugs and Inconveniences</h2>

The [http://code.google.com/p/octgn/issues/ bugtracker] is hosted on [http://code.google.com/ Google Code]
